zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Morris於1665年3月26日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利時，她的父親Edward Morris34歲，母親Grace Bett31歲。她於1685年3月9日與Joshua Child在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1752年3月6日在她的家鄉享年86歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可波斯頓洛斯林達爾沃爾特 史崔特 波英 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Morris于1665年3月26日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利时，她的父亲Edward Morris34岁，母亲Grace Bett31岁。她于1685年3月9日与Joshua Child在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1752年3月6日在她的家乡享年86岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可波斯頓洛斯林達爾沃爾特 史崔特 波英 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Morris
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: from Maurice, an Old French personal name introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from Latin Mauritius, a derivative of Maurus (see Moore ). This was the name of several early Christian saints. In some cases it may be a nickname of the same derivation for someone with a swarthy complexion.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muirghis, a variant of Ó Muirgheasa (see Morrissey ).

Welsh: Anglicized form of the personal name Meurig (from Latin Mauritius), which was gradually superseded in Wales by Morus, Morys, a derivative of the Anglo-Norman French form of the name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Moore
meanings: English: from Middle English more ‘moor, marsh, fen’ (Old English mōr), hence a topographic name for someone who lived in such a place, or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, as for example Moore in Cheshire or More in Shropshire.
English (of Norman origin): ethnic name from Old French more ‘Moor’, either someone from North Africa or, more often, a nickname for someone thought to resemble a Moor. Compare Morrell and Moreau .

English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name More (Old French More, Maur, Latin Maurus), originally denoting either ‘Moor’ or someone with a swarthy complexion (compare Morrell , Morrin , Morris , and sense 2 above). There was a 6th-century Christian saint of this name.

variants.name: Mauritz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Fritz, Armin, Frieda, Helmut, Kurt, Reinhold, Wolfgang.
German and Dutch: from the personal name Mauritz, from Latin Mauritius (see Morris ).

variants.name: Mauricio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Juan, Carlos, Mario, Roberto, Lilia, Luis, Adela, Andres, Antero, Cipriano.  Portuguese Manoel.
Portuguese (Maurício) and Spanish: from the personal name Maurício (Portuguese), Mauricio (Spanish), derived from the Latin name Mauritius (see Morris ).

variants.name: Maurice
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Pierre, Armand, Denys, Gabrielle, Antoine, Benoit, Camille, Cecile, Francois, Gaston, Germain.
French, English, Welsh, Scottish, and Irish: from the Old French personal name Maurice, Latin Mauritius (see Morris ).

variants.name: McMorris
meanings: Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muiris, a patronymic from a Gaelicized form of Morris . In some cases this is a Gaelicized form of Fitzmaurice .
Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muirgheasa ‘son of Muirgheas’, a Gaelic personal name meaning ‘sea valor’ or ‘sea choice’. Compare Morrissey .

variants.name: Morici
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Antonio, Gasper, Aldo, Angelo, Annamarie, Elvio, Giuseppe, Sal, Santo, Vito.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of a variant of the personal name Maurice (see Morris ).
Hungarian: patronymic from the personal name Móric, Hungarian form of Morris .

variants.name: Moris
meanings: English: variant of   Morris  .

French, Luxembourgish, Flemish, Walloon, North German, and Dutch: from a vernacular form of the French personal name Maurice (see Morris ). In North America, the surname Moris may also be an altered form of French Maurice .
Americanized form of German   Moritz  .

variants.name: Merrick
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Meuric, the Middle Welsh form of Maurice (see Morris ).
Irish: borrowed from Welsh. In Ireland, when this is not the Welsh name, it might be adopted for Irish Ó Mearadhaigh, see Merry 2.

variants.name: Maurizio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carlo, Marcello, Marco, Mario, Fernando, Matteo, Natale, Sal, Valentino, Vito.
Italian: from the personal name Maurizio, from Latin Mauritius (see Morris 1).

variants.name: Morehouse
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from any of the many places called Moorhouse in Yorkshire or Durham (from Old English mōr ‘moor’ + hūs ‘house’). In some cases the surname may have become Morris . This name is also established in Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.description: Oldest grave seen in memorial list.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Morris was born on 26 March 1665, in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Edward Morris, was 34 and her mother, Grace Bett, was 31. She married Joshua Child on 9 March 1685, in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 6 March 1752, in her hometown, at the age of 86, and was buried in Walter Street Burying Ground, Roslindale, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Morris est née le 26 mars 1665, à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Edward Morris, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Grace Bett, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Joshua Child le 9 mars 1685, à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 mars 1752, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterrée à Walter Street Burying Ground, Roslindale, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Morris am 26. März 1665 in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edward Morris 34 und ihre Mutter Grace Bett 31. Sie hat am 9. März 1685 in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Joshua Child geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. März 1752 im Alter von 86 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Walter Street Burying Ground, Roslindale, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Morris è nata il il 26 marzo 1665 nel Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Edward Morris, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Grace Bett, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Joshua Child il 9 marzo 1685, nel Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 6 marzo 1752, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolta a Walter Street Burying Ground, Roslindale, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Morrisが1665年3月26日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクロクスブリーで生まれた時，父Edward Morrisは34歳，母Grace Bettは31歳であった。1685年3月9日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクロクスブリーでJoshua Childと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1752年3月6日に故郷で86歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクボストンロスリンダルワルター ストレエト ブリイング グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이

ko.Delaware Township, Northumberland, Penns: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주 노르스벌랜드 데로르 타운시프
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Morris(이)가 1665년 3월 26일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward Morris(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Grace Bett(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1685년 3월 9일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이에서 Joshua Child(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1752년 3월 6일 그녀의 고향에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 보스턴 로슬린데일 월터 스트릿 버이잉 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Morris nasceu em 26 de março de 1665, em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Edward Morris, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Grace Bett, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Joshua Child em 9 de março de 1685, em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de março de 1752, em sua cidade natal, com 86 anos, e foi sepultada em Walter Street Burying Ground, Roslindale, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Morris родилась 26 марта 1665 г. в местности роксбури, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Edward Morris было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Grace Bett, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Joshua Child 9 марта 1685 г. в местности роксбури, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 6 марта 1752 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 86 лет и была похоронена в местности валтир стрит буринг гроунд, рослиндеил, бостон, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

Se casó con Joshua Child el 9 de marzo de 1685, en Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas.
